sentences.arabic: حَصَلَ بِلَالٌ عَلَى جَائِزَةِ أَفْضَلِ طَالِبٍ هَذَا الشَّهْرَ.
sentences.translation: Bilal je dobio nagradu za najboljeg učenika ovog mjeseca.
sentences.translationEn: Bilal received the best student award this month.

sentences.arabic: وَقَفَ أَمَامَ زُمَلَائِهِ وَأَخَذَ الشَّهَادَةَ مِنَ المُدِيرِ.
sentences.translation: Stao je pred drugovima i uzeo diplomu od direktora.
sentences.translationEn: He stood in front of his classmates and received the certificate from the principal.

sentences.translation: Zahvalio se nastavnicima i roditeljima lijepim riječima.
sentences.translationEn: He thanked his teachers and parents with kind words.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ وَالِدَاهُ سَعِيدَيْنِ جِدًّا بِنَجَاحِ ابْنِهِمَا.
sentences.translation: Roditelji su bili jako sretni zbog uspjeha svog sina.
sentences.translationEn: His parents were very happy about their son's success.
